headline: eBay (NASDAQ:EBAY) Q1 Earnings Beat Fails to Lift Stock
summary: eBay beat Q1 2026 estimates with $3.09B revenue and $1.66 EPS, but stock dipped 1.7% after-hours. Strong GMV growth and above-consensus Q2 guidance highlight momentum in luxury and AI-driven features.

headline: GameStop Bets On Retro: Inside The Strategy Behind The Nationwide In-Store Rollout
summary: GameStop Corp. is putting physical shelf space behind a thesis the rest of retail has largely abandoned: that there’s still money in the analog past. The company is rolling out dedicated retro sections in every U.S. store by early May, targeting a global retro console market projected to grow from roughly $3 billion in 2025 to $8 billion by 2033. In exclusive commentary to Benzinga, GameStop detailed how inventory gets sourced, how margins compare to new releases, and why a brick-and-mortar retr

headline: eBay Outage Tests Marketplace Resilience And Investor Confidence
summary: eBay (NasdaqGS:EBAY) experienced a prolonged marketplace outage that has stretched across multiple days, affecting access for buyers and sellers. The company is working to restore full service but has not yet disclosed the root cause, including whether a cyber incident is involved. eBay has not specified which core business functions were disrupted or the potential financial impact of the downtime. The length of the outage and limited disclosure have raised questions about operational...
